apis.name: @State
apis.purpose: 装饰组件内状态变量，变化时自动触发 UI 刷新

apis.name: @Prop
apis.purpose: 从父组件接收单向数据，变化自动同步到子组件

apis.name: @Link
apis.purpose: 与父组件建立双向数据绑定

apis.name: @Watch
apis.purpose: 监听 @State 等状态变量变化并执行回调

apis.name: @Provide
apis.purpose: 提供后代组件可通过 @Consume 访问的状态变量

apis.name: @Consume
apis.purpose: 接收祖先组件通过 @Provide 提供的状态变量

apis.name: @ObjectLink
apis.purpose: 用于组件间传递 @Observed 装饰类的对象引用

apis.name: @Observed
apis.purpose: 装饰 class，使其属性变化可被 @ObjectLink 观察到

apis.name: @StorageLink
apis.purpose: 与 AppStorage 中属性建立双向绑定

apis.name: @StorageProp
apis.purpose: 与 AppStorage 中属性建立单向绑定

apis.name: @LocalStorageLink
apis.purpose: 与 LocalStorage 中属性建立双向绑定

apis.name: @LocalStorageProp
apis.purpose: 与 LocalStorage 中属性建立单向绑定

notableFindings: @State, @Prop, @Link, @Consume, @ObjectLink, @Observed are built-in ArkUI V1 decorators without standalone API reference docs — their definitions reside in dev guides, not reference docs
@StorageLink, @StorageProp, @LocalStorageLink, @LocalStorageProp are referenced only by cross-links in 01_应用级变量的状态管理.md; no standalone API definition exists in the reference docs
The local reference docs have duplicate directories 27_状态管理与渲染控制/ and 28_状态管理与渲染控制/ with same file set; 27/ is the more up-to-date version (V197/V149 vs V187/V139)
@Provide is partially documented via ProvideOptions (allowOverride parameter) in 02_状态管理V1装饰器参数.md — the @Provide decorator itself is not defined in API reference
AppStorageV2, PersistenceV2, @ObservedV2, @Trace V2 APIs are documented separately under @ohos.arkui.StateManagement (API 12+) in 01_ArkTS API/ directory
